sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80049" key="patroge/neios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πατρο-γένειος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, epith. of Poseidon, <sense id="n80049.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ancestral</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.73</biblScope> </bibl> oe (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
